data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Real-time availability sync to Google', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The prior steps focus on creating resources, inviting members, and booking processes, but none specifically address the real-time sync functionality with Google. This indicates a gap in the necessary functionality to fulfill the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of real-time availability sync to Google.
